productVision: The Hestami AI Real Property OS is created to be the integrated holistic end-to-end home services operating system that minimizes friction for property owners and associations by intelligently matching needs with trusted service providers.
productDescription: Hestami AI Real Property OS and Platform is an AI-native ecosystem composed of three interconnected pillars: Hestami Home Real Property Assistant for property owners to manage service calls and vendors, Hestami Service Provider Field Services Management for contractors to manage operations, and Hestami Community Association Management for HOAs to handle governance, accounting, and compliance. It utilizes AI to automate complex workflows like licensing verification, bid comparison, and financial posting while maintaining a persistent, secure data model for long-lived real estate history.
summary: The Hestami AI Real Property OS is a holistic, integrated platform designed to minimize friction across three major pillars: the Home Real Property Assistant, Field Services Management, and Community Association Management (CAM). The product serves a broad ecosystem including individual homeowners, property investors, contractors, association managers, boards, and Hestami staff. It combines modern AI automation with durable workflow engines (DBOS) to create a 'System of Action' for real estate maintenance and governance. Source documents clearly define the functional domains (from accounting to violations) and the target technical stack (SvelteKit, Node/Bun, PostgreSQL, Cloudflare). The phasing strategy is explicit: start with the Home Assistant, expand to Service Provider FSM, then CAM. Ambiguities remain regarding the specific scope of AI agent capabilities in Phase 1 and how 'HOA Context' is tracked externally.

personas.name: Homeowner / Property Investor
personas.description: Individual owners or small landlords managing one or more residences who need to find reliable contractors and manage maintenance requests.
goals: Minimize time spent finding and vetting contractors
Coordinate site visits and manage repair schedules
painPoints: Wasting time on finding reliable contractors
Risk from inconsistent or incomplete bids

personas.name: Service Provider / Contractor
personas.description: Tradespeople or business owners (HVAC, plumbing, electrical) who need to manage work orders, scheduling, estimates, and invoicing.
goals: Manage customer-facing interactions and backend operations from one platform
Minimize travel time through intelligent dispatching
Generate accurate estimates and invoices in the field

personas.name: Community Association Manager
personas.description: Management company staff responsible for handling HOA finances, compliance, governance, and member support.
goals: Automate routine workflows to focus on relationships
painPoints: Difficulty tracking violations or architectural requests

personas.name: Board Member
personas.description: Owners elected to the HOA board who need to review documents, vote on resolutions, and oversee governance.
painPoints: Confusion over voting rules or compliance

personas.name: Hestami Staff / Admin
personas.description: Platform support or operations team members responsible for maintaining system integrity, workflows, and user support.

personas.name: Property Manager
personas.description: Professional managers for single-family or multi-unit assets who bridge owner and vendor gaps.
goals: Oversee maintenance schedules for multiple properties
painPoints: Lack of centralized platform for tenant requests

userJourneys.title: Create Home Repair Request
userJourneys.scenario: When a homeowner needs maintenance done, they submit a request via the app to initiate the matching engine.
acceptanceCriteria: Request is visible to vendors within 1 hour
Photos are securely stored in DOM-DOCUMENT

userJourneys.title: View Matched Vendor Proposals
userJourneys.scenario: After submission, the homeowner receives bids from vetted vendors and selects one.

steps.expectedOutcome: Request status changes to In Progress

acceptanceCriteria: Vendor insurance is verified via DOM-RISK
Homeowner can reject a vendor without penalty

userJourneys.title: Accept Field Service Job
userJourneys.scenario: A service provider receives a dispatch alert and accepts the work order.
acceptanceCriteria: Job appears in P-2 schedule immediately

userJourneys.title: Complete Job and Submit Invoice
userJourneys.scenario: The contractor finishes the work and generates a bill through the app.

steps.expectedOutcome: Invoice sent to DOM-FINANCE for processing

acceptanceCriteria: Invoice matches labor and material costs

userJourneys.title: Approve and Pay Invoice
userJourneys.scenario: The homeowner reviews the submitted invoice and confirms payment.
acceptanceCriteria: Payment is deducted from saved card

userJourneys.title: Process HOA Monthly Payment
userJourneys.scenario: Community Association Manager reconciles monthly dues and vendor invoices.

userJourneys.title: Issue Violation Notice
userJourneys.scenario: Manager documents a rule violation and issues a formal notice.

userJourneys.title: Vote on Resolutions
userJourneys.scenario: Board Member reviews and votes on community financial or structural resolutions.

userJourneys.title: Manage Tenant Maintenance
userJourneys.scenario: Property Manager coordinates maintenance requests from multiple tenants.

steps.expectedOutcome: Job assigned to P-2 in DOM-OPERATIONS

userJourneys.title: Onboard New User
userJourneys.scenario: Hestami Admin adds a new vendor or owner to the system.

phasingStrategy.description: Hestami Home Real Property Assistant. Focuses on the core value of connecting owners with reliable services, handling onboarding, intake, and matching.
phasingStrategy.rationale: Delivers immediate relief to the largest number of potential users (homeowners) by solving the most common pain points (finding contractors, managing repairs).

phasingStrategy.description: Hestami Service Provider Field Services Management. Expands capabilities to the contractors and tradespeople who execute the work.
phasingStrategy.rationale: Captures value from the service providers side, improving their operational efficiency and profitability, creating a network effect.

phasingStrategy.description: Hestami Community Association Management. Delivers the comprehensive HOA governance and financial management suite.
phasingStrategy.rationale: Complex domain requiring deep compliance and accounting integrations, suitable for after the core matching engine is proven.

successMetrics: Reduction in property owner time spent finding service providers.
Increase in contractor dispatching efficiency (reduced travel time).
Decrease in administrative overhead for CAMs (automated AR/AP).
User adoption rate across all three pillars.
Number of service calls resolved without human intervention.

businessDomainProposals.name: Property Asset Registry
businessDomainProposals.description: Core registry for real estate assets, addresses, and inventory management within multi-tenant isolation.
businessDomainProposals.rationale: Essential for UJ-1 (Onboarding). Maps to P-1 and P-8. Covers asset ingestion and versioning.

businessDomainProposals.name: Vendor Management & Vetting
businessDomainProposals.description: Profiles for service providers, license verification, insurance validation, and capability tracking.
businessDomainProposals.rationale: Core to UJ-2 (Vendor Matching). Enables P-1 to vet providers and P-2 to manage operations.

businessDomainProposals.name: Service Request Intake
businessDomainProposals.description: Service call creation, triage, prioritization, and initial matching engine logic.
businessDomainProposals.rationale: Directly supports UJ-2. Central pillar of Hestami Home Real Property Assistant.

businessDomainProposals.name: Field Service Operations
businessDomainProposals.description: Work order execution, dispatching, scheduling, and job completion workflows.
businessDomainProposals.rationale: Enables UJ-3. Critical for P-2 to manage operations and travel time.

businessDomainProposals.name: Financial Services
businessDomainProposals.description: Invoicing, payments, AR/AP, budgeting, and financial posting for owners and HOAs.
businessDomainProposals.rationale: Required for CAM (P-3) and Owner cost tracking (P-1). Covers AR/AP and payment processing.

businessDomainProposals.name: Governance & Compliance
businessDomainProposals.description: HOA rules, violation tracking, notice sequences, and statutory deadline management.
businessDomainProposals.rationale: Addresses P-3 and P-4 goals. Supports requirements for tracking violations and notices.

businessDomainProposals.name: Document Management
businessDomainProposals.description: Secure storage for contracts, photos, permits, reports, and archival documents.
businessDomainProposals.rationale: Implied by P-3 and P-4 need to access archival documents. Supports compliance and reporting.

businessDomainProposals.name: Notification Engine
businessDomainProposals.description: Push, email, SMS, and in-app alerts for status updates, deadline reminders, and announcements.
businessDomainProposals.rationale: Implied by UJ-1 and UJ-2 communication needs. Essential for maintaining engagement.

businessDomainProposals.name: Identity & Access
businessDomainProposals.description: Multi-tenant isolation, SSO, permission matrices, and security policy enforcement.
businessDomainProposals.rationale: Required by requirements (Multi-tenant isolation). Foundational for all personas.

businessDomainProposals.name: Analytics & Reporting
businessDomainProposals.description: Dashboards, financial reports, activity logs, and insights for boards and admins.
businessDomainProposals.rationale: Supports P-3 and P-4 goals to review reports. Provides P-5 system health data.

businessDomainProposals.name: Community Hub
businessDomainProposals.description: Forums, announcements, voting, and transparent communication channels for HOA governance.
businessDomainProposals.rationale: Enables P-4 goals to communicate transparently. Supports community engagement.

businessDomainProposals.name: Insurance & Liability
businessDomainProposals.description: Verification of insurance coverage and liability management during work order execution.
businessDomainProposals.rationale: Addresses P-2 and P-1 pain points regarding vendor legitimacy and risk.

entityProposals.name: User
entityProposals.description: Represents a human actor in the system including owners, contractors, admins, and board members with authentication credentials.

entityProposals.name: User Profile
entityProposals.description: Extends user identity with display names, avatars, and contact preferences for field operations.

entityProposals.name: Role
entityProposals.description: Defines a collection of permissions for system access levels such as Admin, BoardMember, Vendor, or Homeowner.

entityProposals.name: Permission
entityProposals.description: Granular access control entry defining specific actions allowed on resources like ReadInvoice or CreateRequest.

entityProposals.name: Active Session
entityProposals.description: Tracks active login sessions for security revocation and concurrent usage limits.

entityProposals.name: Tenancy
entityProposals.description: Defines the legal tenancy relationship between a user and a property for lease compliance tracking.

entityProposals.name: Property
entityProposals.description: Master registry for real estate assets including addresses, ownership structures, and unit definitions.

entityProposals.name: Building
entityProposals.description: Structural container for units and addresses within a multi-unit asset management scope.

entityProposals.name: Address
entityProposals.description: Standardized physical location data including geocoordinates and validation status.

entityProposals.name: Unit
entityProposals.description: Individual residential or commercial space within a property used for billing and maintenance targeting.

entityProposals.name: Lease
entityProposals.description: Contractual agreement defining rights and obligations between owner, tenant, and service provider.

entityProposals.name: Permit
entityProposals.description: Regulatory approval documents attached to a property or specific work order for compliance verification.

entityProposals.name: Vendor
entityProposals.description: Profiles for service providers, contractors, and vendors registered in the marketplace.

entityProposals.name: Vendor Certificate
entityProposals.description: Holds scanned copies of license or business registration for vetting verification.

entityProposals.name: Vendor Insurance
entityProposals.description: Tracks liability and property insurance policy details required for risk mitigation.

entityProposals.name: Pricing Tier
entityProposals.description: Defines hourly rates or fixed price structures for specific trade skills.

entityProposals.name: Service Request
entityProposals.description: Intake form for maintenance needs created by homeowners or property managers for triage.

entityProposals.name: Scope of Work
entityProposals.description: Detailed description and requirements attached to the service request for vendor matching.

entityProposals.name: Bid Option
entityProposals.description: Proposed solution and pricing submitted by a vendor for a specific service request.

entityProposals.name: Work Order
entityProposals.description: Execution plan derived from matched bids representing the approved service job.

entityProposals.name: Field Assignment
entityProposals.description: Specific dispatch instruction sent to a vendor or technician to accept the work order.

entityProposals.name: Material
entityProposals.description: Track parts or supplies required for the completion of the work order.

entityProposals.name: Time Entry
entityProposals.description: Logs labor hours worked on the field job for billing and payroll processing.

entityProposals.name: Ledger
entityProposals.description: Core accounting ledger tracking all financial transactions for AP and AR.

entityProposals.name: Transaction
entityProposals.description: Immutably recorded financial event such as payments, refunds, or adjustments.

entityProposals.name: Invoice
entityProposals.description: Billing document generated from completed work orders requesting payment from owner or HOA.

entityProposals.name: Payment Record
entityProposals.description: History of payments processed towards an invoice or monthly dues.

entityProposals.name: Budget Header
entityProposals.description: Master budget definition for an HOA or entity for a fiscal year.

entityProposals.name: Budget Line
entityProposals.description: Individual line item within a budget for expenses or revenue categories.

entityProposals.name: Rule Set
entityProposals.description: Collection of governing documents and bylaws for a specific community.

entityProposals.name: Rule Clause
entityProposals.description: Specific enforcement criteria within the rule set regarding conduct or aesthetics.

entityProposals.name: Violation Report
entityProposals.description: Documented instance of non-compliance with rules requiring formal notice.

entityProposals.name: Notice
entityProposals.description: Formal legal notification sequence tracking deadlines and resident actions.

entityProposals.name: Appeal
entityProposals.description: Formal request to waive or modify a compliance penalty or notice.

entityProposals.name: Repository
entityProposals.description: Container holding all documents, photos, and files within a secure archive.

entityProposals.name: Folder
entityProposals.description: Hierarchical organization node within the document repository.

entityProposals.name: Document
entityProposals.description: Single file or record version stored securely with retention policy applied.

entityProposals.name: Channel
entityProposals.description: Configuration for delivery method such as push, email, SMS, or in-app alerts.

entityProposals.name: Template
entityProposals.description: Message blueprint defining content and variables for notifications.

entityProposals.name: Notification Job
entityProposals.description: Executed instance of sending a notification to a user or group.

entityProposals.name: Community Group
entityProposals.description: Logical grouping for members such as HOA board, neighbors, or committee.

entityProposals.name: Forum
entityProposals.description: Public or private discussion board for community questions and announcements.

entityProposals.name: Post
entityProposals.description: Individual message or thread within the community forum.

entityProposals.name: Vote
entityProposals.description: Record of a ballot cast by a member on a community resolution.

entityProposals.name: Resolution
entityProposals.description: Formal proposal requiring a vote for board decisions or policy changes.

entityProposals.name: Announcement
entityProposals.description: System-generated or board-issued updates for community-wide visibility.

entityProposals.name: Insurance Policy
entityProposals.description: Policy details for vendor liability or property coverage during job execution.

entityProposals.name: Liability Certificate
entityProposals.description: Proof of insurance document required before vendor dispatch.

entityProposals.name: Dashboard
entityProposals.description: Visualized view for analytics aggregating metrics for board or admin consumption.

entityProposals.name: Metric
entityProposals.description: Defined measurement unit for reporting like cost per job or response time.

entityProposals.name: System Setting
entityProposals.description: Global or tenant-level configurations for behavior, thresholds, and defaults.

entityProposals.name: Audit Log
entityProposals.description: Immutable record of security events such as login attempts or data changes.

entityProposals.name: Property Vendor Link
entityProposals.description: Many-to-many junction recording which vendors are authorized to service which properties.

entityProposals.name: User Property Link
entityProposals.description: Defines ownership or management rights for a user across multiple properties.

entityProposals.name: Tenant Option
entityProposals.description: Preferences or rules specific to a tenant such as payment schedule or repair request type.

entityProposals.name: Billing Unit
entityProposals.description: Sub-division for utility or HOA fee allocation distinct from physical property units.

entityProposals.name: Monthly Due
entityProposals.description: Recurring billing schedule for HOA dues calculated for the month.

entityProposals.name: Service Catalog
entityProposals.description: List of standard services available for selection during request intake.

workflowProposals.name: Intake Triage Workflow
workflowProposals.description: Processes incoming service requests, validates data, and queues for matching.
steps: Assign priority based on urgency flags

workflowProposals.name: Vendor Vetting Process
workflowProposals.description: Automated checks to ensure contractors are licensed and insured.
steps: Scan license numbers against state DB

workflowProposals.name: Smart Dispatch Engine
workflowProposals.description: Matches available technicians to requests based on skills and proximity.
steps: Filter vendors by skill set required
Calculate travel time from current location
Score vendors by availability and rating

workflowProposals.name: Invoice Generation and Posting
workflowProposals.description: Creates invoices from completed work orders and posts them to AP ledger.
steps: Apply tax rules based on location
Send to DOM-NOTIFY for owner approval

workflowProposals.name: Alert and Reminder Distribution
workflowProposals.description: Sends relevant push, email, or SMS notifications based on system events.

workflowProposals.name: Statutory Notice Sequencer
workflowProposals.description: Manages the timeline for legal notices to ensure HOA compliance.
steps: Calculate notice deadline based on rule type
Escalate to second notice if ignored

workflowProposals.name: Resolution Voting Workflow
workflowProposals.description: Enables board and members to propose and vote on community decisions.

workflowProposals.name: Insurance Coverage Verification
workflowProposals.description: Checks vendor liability and property insurance before job assignment.
steps: Scan job request for risk type

workflowProposals.name: Secure Document Archiving
workflowProposals.description: Stores contracts, permits, and work reports securely with retention policies.
steps: Link to specific work order ID

workflowProposals.name: Financial Dashboard Generation
workflowProposals.description: Compiles spending and revenue data into monthly reports for boards.
steps: Filter by date range and domain

workflowProposals.name: Access Provisioning and Revoking
workflowProposals.description: Handles SSO and permission changes for users entering or leaving the platform.

workflowProposals.name: Asset Registry Sync
workflowProposals.description: Updates property details like address or ownership status across the system.

integrationProposals.name: Identity Provider Integration
integrationProposals.description: Manages multi-tenant isolation and SSO for users via external IDP.
integrationProposals.rationale: Supports WF-11 Access Provisioning for P-5 Admin and P-4 Board security requirements.

integrationProposals.name: Geocoding and Map Services
integrationProposals.description: Validates addresses and provides geocoordinates for property assets.
integrationProposals.rationale: Critical for WF-3 Smart Dispatch Engine proximity matching and DOM-PROPERTY Address entities.

integrationProposals.name: Object Storage Service
integrationProposals.description: Secure archival for contracts, photos, and reports with retention policies.
integrationProposals.rationale: Supports WF-9 Secure Document Archiving for DOM-DOCUMENT Repository entities.

integrationProposals.name: Insurance Verification Service
integrationProposals.description: Checks vendor liability and property insurance policy validity.
integrationProposals.rationale: Enables WF-8 Insurance Coverage Verification for DOM-RISK domain compliance.

integrationProposals.name: License Verification Engine
integrationProposals.description: Automated checks to ensure contractors hold valid trade licenses.
integrationProposals.rationale: Supports WF-2 Vendor Vetting Process for DOM-VENDOR entities.

integrationProposals.name: Payment Gateway
integrationProposals.description: Processes homeowner and HOA payments for invoices and dues.
integrationProposals.rationale: Directly enables UJ-5 Approve and Pay Invoice and UJ-6 HOA Monthly Payment flows.

integrationProposals.name: Accounting ERP Connector
integrationProposals.description: Syncs financial transactions, AR/AP, and ledgers to external accounting software.
integrationProposals.rationale: Facilitates WF-4 Invoice Generation and Posting for DOM-FINANCE Ledger entities.

integrationProposals.name: Transactional Email Service
integrationProposals.description: Sends invoices, receipts, and formal notices via email.
integrationProposals.rationale: Required for WF-5 Alert Distribution and DOM-NOTIFY channel delivery.

integrationProposals.name: SMS Gateway
integrationProposals.description: Delivers urgent dispatch alerts and violation reminders via text.
integrationProposals.rationale: Supports DOM-NOTIFY urgent notifications for UJ-1 Request creation context.

integrationProposals.name: Push Notification Service
integrationProposals.description: Manages in-app alerts for status updates and deadlines.
integrationProposals.rationale: Enables DOM-NOTIFY Push channel for UJ-2 Vendor Proposals acceptance.

integrationProposals.name: VoIP Verification Service
integrationProposals.description: Handles voice calls for vendor onboarding and verification.
integrationProposals.rationale: Assists P-1 Homeowner and P-2 Vendor interactions during UJ-1 Onboarding.

integrationProposals.name: Digital Signature Provider
integrationProposals.description: Secure e-signatures for contracts, leases, and work order acceptances.
integrationProposals.rationale: Required for DOM-DOCUMENT Lease and Work Order approvals in workflows.

integrationProposals.name: Credit Check API
integrationProposals.description: Validates creditworthiness of homeowners or vendors for financial risk.
integrationProposals.rationale: Supports risk mitigation for UJ-5 Invoice approval and vendor onboarding.

integrationProposals.name: Business Intelligence Connector
integrationProposals.description: Feeds data to external dashboards for financial reporting and insights.
integrationProposals.rationale: Enables WF-10 Financial Dashboard Generation for P-4 Board Members.

integrationProposals.name: Calendar Sync Service
integrationProposals.description: Synchronizes technician schedules and work order assignments.
integrationProposals.rationale: Critical for WF-3 Smart Dispatch scheduling for P-2 Service Providers.

integrationProposals.name: Immutable Audit Logging
integrationProposals.description: Stores tamper-proof security event logs for compliance verification.
integrationProposals.rationale: Required for DOM-AUTH Audit Log entity integrity and security policy enforcement.

integrationProposals.name: Vendor Relationship Manager
integrationProposals.description: Manages lifecycle of vendors, ratings, and performance metrics.
integrationProposals.rationale: Supports P-3 Community Association Manager vendor oversight workflows.

integrationProposals.name: Route Optimization Engine
integrationProposals.description: Plans efficient paths for field technicians to minimize travel time.
integrationProposals.rationale: Optimizes P-2 Service Provider travel for UJ-3 Accept Field Service Job.

integrationProposals.name: Field Time Tracking
integrationProposals.description: Captures labor hours and job completion timestamps for billing.
integrationProposals.rationale: Supports ENT-TIME-ENTRY logging for billing in WF-4 Invoice Generation.

integrationProposals.name: Legal Clause Database
integrationProposals.description: Provides searchable HOA rules and bylaws for violation checks.
integrationProposals.rationale: Enables WF-6 Statutory Notice Sequencer for DOM-COMPLIANCE Rule Sets.

integrationProposals.name: Voice Call Recording
integrationProposals.description: Stores call recordings for dispute resolution and compliance.
integrationProposals.rationale: Supports P-1 Homeowner interactions for UJ-1 Intake and dispute resolution.

integrationProposals.name: Payment Adjustment Service
integrationProposals.description: Manages refunds, credits, and transaction reversals securely.
integrationProposals.rationale: Enables P-1 Homeowner refund requests and WF-4 Ledger adjustments.

integrationProposals.name: Email Bounceback Handler
integrationProposals.description: Processes bounced emails to update notification channel status.
integrationProposals.rationale: Ensures DOM-NOTIFY Email channel reliability for DOM-COMMUNITY announcements.

qualityAttributes: System response time under 200ms for 95th percentile API requests
All data at rest encrypted using AES-256 standard
Multi-tenant data isolation verified via logical schema separation
Payment transaction audit log retention minimum 7 years
Email delivery failure rate below 1% within 24 hours
Backup recovery point objective RPO less than 15 minutes
User session timeout automatically after 30 minutes of inactivity
SSL TLS 1 3 enforced for all external connections
Cross-region replication latency under 50ms for active active databases
Disk capacity usage alerts triggered at 80% utilization
Database write throughput minimum 10k transactions per second
Search index latency below 100ms for 99% of queries
Zero trust network access enforced for all admin portals
PCI DSS Level 1 compliance certification maintained annually
Notification delivery success rate above 98% within 5 minutes
GDPR data processing agreements signed with all third party processors
Audit logs tamper proof using hash chaining mechanism
uxRequirements: Mobile-first design for homeowners and technicians.
High-performance, reactive displays for admin portals.
AI interactions must explain reasoning or show evidence.

requirements.text: System must support durable, versioned workflows via DBOS for idempotency.
System must enforce multi-tenant isolation via PostgreSQL Row-Level Security.
System must verify vendor licenses and insurance automatically.
System must handle periodic assessment posting automatically.
System must track violations and notice sequences.

decisions.text: The platform will use DBOS for all stateful logic to guarantee durability.
Cloudflare is the sole public entry point for all traffic.
Nextdoor integration is explicitly out of scope for Phase 1.
The Common Data Model is logical and persistent, not ephemeral.

constraints.text: No direct client access to origin IP; must tunnel through Cloudflare.
Malware scanning must be performed via ClamAV before processing files.
System must respect statutory deadlines for HOA notices and voting.
Nextdoor integration is out-of-scope at this time.
Platform must support offline mode for mobile operations.

openQuestions.text: How should the system handle external HOA contexts where the HOA is not a direct platform participant?
Which external AI providers or self-hosted models will power the 'AI Native' features in Phase 1?
What specific regulatory jurisdictions will the Compliance domain support initially (federal vs. state vs. local)?
How will the 'Decision, Rationale & Trust Ledger' be displayed to the user to ensure transparency?
